sections.paragraph:
fut יִפְגּשׁ (kindred to the roots פָּגַע, נָגַשׁ)-

(1) to rush upon any one, to attack, with an acc., Exo 4:24 Hos 13:8.

(2) to meet with any one; followed by an acc., Gen 32:18 33:8 Exo 4:27 Isa 34:14 followed by בְּ Pro 17:12.

Niphal, recipr, to meet one with another, Psa 85:11 Pro 22:2.

Piel, to light upon any thing, Job 5:14.
